mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id as "id", p.product_id as "productId", p.product_name as "name", p.description as "description", p.brand as "brandName", p.primary_image_url as "imageUrl", p.base_price as "price", p.base_price as "mrp", p.selling_price as "offerPrice", CASE WHEN p.base_price > 0 AND p.selling_price > 0 THEN ((p.base_price - p.selling_price) * 100 / p.base_price) ELSE 0 END as "discount", CASE WHEN COALESCE(fi.available_qty, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", COALESCE(fi.available_qty, 0) as "availableQuantity", COALESCE(p.avg_rating, 0) as "averageRating", COALESCE(p.review_count, 0) as "reviewCount", p.category_id as "categoryId", p.seller_id as "supplierId", p.featured as "featured", p.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", 'INR' as "currency" FROM hm_query.dim_product p LEFT JOIN hm_query.fact_inventory fi ON fi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.category_id = #{categoryId} AND p.brand = #{brand} AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) AND p.product_id = #{id} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND featured = true

SELECT p.product_id as "id", p.product_id as "productId", p.product_name as "name", p.description as "description", p.brand as "brandName", p.primary_image_url as "imageUrl", p.base_price as "price", p.base_price as "mrp", p.selling_price as "offerPrice", CASE WHEN p.base_price > 0 AND p.selling_price > 0 THEN ((p.base_price - p.selling_price) * 100 / p.base_price) ELSE 0 END as "discount", CASE WHEN COALESCE(fi.available_qty, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", COALESCE(p.avg_rating, 0) as "averageRating", COALESCE(p.review_count, 0) as "reviewCount", p.category_id as "categoryId", 'INR' as "currency" FROM hm_query.dim_product p LEFT JOIN hm_query.fact_inventory fi ON fi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.featured = true ORDER BY p.review_count DESC, p.avg_rating DESC ${pagination}

SELECT c.category_id as "id", c.category_name as "name", c.slug as "slug", c.parent_id as "parentId", c.image_url as "imageUrl", c.description as "description", c.level as "level", c.display_order as "sortOrder", COALESCE(c.product_count, 0) as "productCount" FROM hm_query.dim_category c WHERE c.active = true AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.display_order, 999), c.category_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')

SELECT p.product_id as "id", p.product_name as "text", 'product' as "type", p.product_id as "productId" FROM hm_query.dim_product p WHERE p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ORDER BY p.product_name ASC ${pagination}

SELECT b.banner_id as "id", b.title as "title", b.image_url as "imageUrl", b.mobile_image_url as "mobileImageUrl", b.link_url as "linkUrl", b.position as "position", b.display_order as "displayOrder" FROM hm_query.dim_banner b WHERE b.active = true AND (b.active_from IS NULL OR b.active_from <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (b.active_to IS NULL OR b.active_to >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY COALESCE(b.display_order, 999)
SELECT DISTINCT brand as "value", brand as "label", 'brand' as "filterType" FROM hm_query.dim_product WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND brand IS NOT NULL ORDER BY brand

SELECT p.product_id as "id", p.product_name as "name", p.description as "description", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.slug as "slug", p.category_id as "categoryId", p.category_name as "categoryName", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "mrp", p.hsn_code as "hsnCode", p.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", p.warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", p.is_returnable as "isReturnable", p.return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", '' as "metaTitle", '' as "metaDescription", COALESCE(fi.available_qty, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(fi.available_qty, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", COALESCE(p.avg_rating, 0) as "averageRating", COALESCE(p.review_count, 0) as "reviewCount" FROM hm_query.dim_product p LEFT JOIN hm_query.fact_inventory fi ON fi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.slug = #{slug}

SELECT pv.variant_id as "variantId", pv.product_id as "productId", pv.sku as "sku", COALESCE(pv.selling_price, pv.mrp) as "sellingPrice", COALESCE(pv.mrp, 0) as "mrp", COALESCE(pv.available_qty, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(pv.available_qty, 0) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", '' as "offerId", pv.variant_status as "offerState" FROM hm_query.product_variant_flat pv WHERE pv.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pv.sku

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.order_status as "stateId", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.order_date as "createdTime", o.total_items as "itemCount", o.payment_status as "paymentStatus", o.payment_method as "paymentMethod", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", o.carrier as "carrier", o.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDeliveryDate" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.tenant = #{tenant} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.order_date DESC ${pagination}

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.order_status as "stateId", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.order_date as "createdTime", o.total_items as "itemCount", o.payment_status as "paymentStatus", o.payment_method as "paymentMethod", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", o.carrier as "carrier", o.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDeliveryDate" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.tenant = #{tenant} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.order_date DESC ${pagination}

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.order_status as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.total_items as "itemCount", o.order_date as "createdTime", o.payment_id as "paymentId", o.payment_status as "paymentStatus", o.payment_method as "paymentMethod", o.total_amount as "paymentAmount", o.shipment_id as "shipmentId", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.carrier as "carrier", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", o.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", o.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDeliveryDate", o.actual_delivery as "actualDeliveryDate", '' as "currentLocation" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT oi.item_id as "itemId", oi.product_id as "productId", oi.product_name as "productName", oi.variant_id as "variantId", oi.sku as "sku", oi.quantity as "quantity", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "totalPrice", oi.fulfillment_status as "itemStatus", oi.product_slug as "productSlug", oi.brand as "brand", oi.image_url as "imageUrl" FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.created_time ASC

SELECT o.shipment_id as "shipmentId", o.order_id as "orderId", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.carrier as "carrier", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", o.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", o.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDeliveryDate", o.actual_delivery as "actualDeliveryDate", '' as "currentLocation", 0 as "deliveryAttempts", '' as "eventType", '' as "eventDescription", '' as "eventLocation", o.order_date as "eventTime" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT c.cart_id as "cartId", c.cart_status as "cartState", c.subtotal as "subtotal", c.currency as "currency", c.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", c.item_id as "itemId", c.product_id as "productId", c.variant_id as "variantId", c.product_name as "productName", c.sku as "sku", c.quantity as "quantity", c.unit_price as "unitPrice", c.total_price as "totalPrice", c.image_url as "imageUrl", c.product_slug as "productSlug", c.brand as "brand", COALESCE(c.available_qty, 0) as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.available_qty, 0) >= c.quantity THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock" FROM hm_query.cart_detail_flat c WHERE c.cart_status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY c.created_time ASC

SELECT r.review_id as "reviewId", r.product_id as "productId", r.customer_id as "customerId", r.rating as "rating", r.title as "title", r.comment as "comment", r.is_verified_purchase as "isVerifiedPurchase", r.helpful_count as "helpfulCount", r.created_time as "createdTime", r.reviewer_name as "reviewerName" FROM hm_query.review_flat r WHERE r.review_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.rating = #{rating} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT DISTINCT brand as "name", COUNT(*) as "productCount" FROM hm_query.dim_product WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY brand

SELECT MIN(base_price) as "minPrice", MAX(base_price) as "maxPrice", AVG(base_price) as "avgPrice" FROM hm_query.dim_product WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND base_price IS NOT NULL AND base_price > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.wishlist_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT wi.wishlist_item_id as "id", wi.product_id as "productId", wi.variant_id as "variantId", wi.added_at as "addedAt", wi.price_when_added as "priceWhenAdded", wi.notify_on_price_drop as "notifyOnPriceDrop", wi.product_name as "productName", wi.brand as "brand", wi.image_url as "imageUrl", wi.current_price as "currentPrice", wi.mrp as "mrp", wi.offer_price as "offerPrice", wi.in_stock as "inStock", wi.discount_percent as "discount", wi.avg_rating as "averageRating", wi.review_count as "reviewCount" FROM hm_query.wishlist_flat wi WHERE wi.customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT u.customer_id as "id", u.first_name as "firstName", u.last_name as "lastName", u.email as "email", u.phone as "phone", u.role as "role", u.customer_status as "stateId", u.keycloak_id as "keycloakId", u.default_address_id as "defaultAddressId", u.created_time as "createdTime", COALESCE(u.address_count, 0) as "addressCount" FROM hm_query.customer_360_flat u WHERE u.customer_status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.keycloak_id = #{customerId}

SELECT ua.address_id as "id", ua.customer_id as "userId", ua.address_line1 as "addressLine1", ua.address_line2 as "addressLine2", ua.city as "city", ua.state as "state", ua.postal_code as "postalCode", ua.country as "country", ua.phone as "phone", ua.label as "label", ua.is_default as "isDefault" FROM hm_query.address_flat ua WHERE ua.customer_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ua.is_default DESC, ua.address_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.return_detail_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT r.return_id as "returnId", r.order_id as "orderId", r.order_item_id as "orderItemId", r.reason as "reason", r.description as "description", r.return_status as "stateId", r.quantity as "quantity", r.refund_amount as "refundAmount", r.return_type as "returnType", r.created_time as "createdTime", r.product_name as "productName", r.sku as "sku" FROM hm_query.return_detail_flat r WHERE r.customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
